tags.description: A map of tags to add to all resources

ami.description: ID of the AMI to use.

instance_type.description: Type of instance to use. See https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/instance-types/ for available instance types.

security_group_ids.description: List of security group IDs to associate with the launch template

key_name.description: Name of the SSH key to use.

subnet_id.description: ID of the subnet to deploy the EC2 instance

root_volume_type.description: Type of root volume (e.g., gp2, io1)

root_volume_size.description: Size of root volume in GB

user_data.description: Paste your bash script here without encoding or EOF marker. Updates to this field will trigger a stop/start of the EC2 instance by default. We don't support built-in functions to reference files yet !
